Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All hematological parameters are within normal limits except for a markedly elevated platelet distribution width (PDW), which may indicate increased variability in platelet size, often seen in reactive or inflammatory states. No evidence of anemia, leukocytosis, or thrombocytopenia. Clinical correlation is recommended to assess for possible underlying causes of increased PDW.
Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
